chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2487 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ For order on maintainability 06.05.2025 Mr. Talha Makhdoom, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Wajiha Mehdi Asstt. Attorney General M/s Malik Naeem Iqbal and Muhammad Talha Abbasi advocates for respondent No.2 -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The petitioner’s main grievance is against the Defence Housing Authority (DHA). The petitioner has filed an extract of the claim in respect of his grievance. A copy of this extract has been provided to learned counsel for the respondent No.2/DHA in Court today, who shall present the it to the DHA. The DHA shall consider the petitioner’s claim and pass a speaking order after affording the petitioner an opportunity of personal hearing, within three months from the date of this order. It is clarified that, while addressing the petitioner’s grievance, the merits of the case shall not be examined. A copy of this order shall be sent to Administrator, DHA for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
